langs.en: High pollution. Avoid outdoor activity, keep windows shut, use a mask outdoors.
langs.hi: Uchch pradushan. Bahar ki gatividhi se bachein, khidkiyan band rakhein, bahar mask pahnein.

langs.en: Moderate pollution. Limit prolonged outdoor exertion if you have heart or lung conditions.
langs.hi: Madhyam pradushan. Hriday ya phephde ki bimari ho to lambe samay tak bahar shram na karein.

langs.en: Severe pollution. Stay indoors, run air purifiers, protect children and the elderly.
langs.hi: Gambhir pradushan. Ghar ke andar rahein, air purifier chalayein, bachchon aur budhon ko bachayein.

langs.en: Moderate pollution. Limit prolonged outdoor exertion if you have heart or lung conditions.
langs.hi: Madhyam pradushan. Hriday ya phephde ki bimari ho to lambe samay tak bahar shram na karein.
